dmls.message.no_modules: No modules are available for your selected rank.
dmls.validation.config.save_failed: Could not save the setting; the previous value is still active.
dmls.chat.config.save_failed: Could not save the setting; the previous value is still active.
dmls.update.available: DMLS update available: %s — please update the mod!
dmls.option.allowed_servers.description: Stoneworks commands run only on these exact hosts or explicit *.host rules. Click an existing entry to remove it.
dmls.dropdown.usage.closed: Press Enter to open the choices.
dmls.dropdown.usage.open: Use Up and Down to choose, Enter to select, and Escape to close.
dmls.module.chat_alerts.name: Chat Alerts
dmls.module.chat_alerts.description: Receive an alert when a configured word appears in chat.
dmls.module.chat_alerts.reload_failed: Reload failed; keeping %s previously loaded alert words.
dmls.module.check_alts.name: Check Alts
dmls.module.check_alts.description.1: Run /alts and then /history on every found account.
dmls.module.check_alts.description.2: Ends with a punishment summary per account.
dmls.module.check_lands.name: Check Lands
dmls.module.check_lands.description.1: Check the lands and ranks for one or more players.
dmls.module.check_lands.description.2: Separate multiple IGNs with commas or spaces.
dmls.module.check_members.name: Check Members
dmls.module.check_members.description.1: List all members of a land grouped by rank.
dmls.module.check_members.description.2: Click a name in the result to check their lands.
dmls.module.donor_pet.name: Donor Pets
dmls.module.donor_pet.description: Give a donor the permission for their elite mount pet.
dmls.module.prefix.name: Prefix Creation
dmls.module.prefix.description.1: Create a formatted prefix, set its player limit
dmls.module.promo_wave.name: Promo Wave
dmls.module.promo_wave.description.1: Promote a whole wave of staff to a rank in one command.
dmls.module.promo_wave.description.2: Separate names with commas or spaces.
dmls.module.chat_spam.name: Chat Spam Mute
dmls.module.chat_spam.description: Hide trade chat and server messages on this client.
dmls.module.xray.name: Xray Rollback
dmls.module.xray.description.1: Roll back a confirmed xrayer: ores and tunnels (30d),
dmls.module.xray.warning: This rolls back the player's blocks and containers, use with care.
dmls.module.uuid.name: UUID Lookup
dmls.module.uuid.description.1: Look up as many as 10 Minecraft UUIDs using Mojang's API.
dmls.module.uuid.description.2: Separate usernames with commas or spaces; results can be copied.
dmls.module.event_protect.name: Event Protect
dmls.module.event_protect.description: Broadcast a protection message for protected events
dmls.validation.event_protect.name: Enter 1-64 characters without formatting codes or line breaks.
dmls.validation.server_blocked: Connect to an allowed server before submitting.
dmls.field.player_ign.label: Player IGN:
dmls.field.player_igns.label: Player IGN(s):
dmls.field.land_name.label: Land name:
dmls.field.prefix_id.label: Prefix ID:
dmls.field.prefix_text.label: Prefix text:
dmls.field.preview.label: Preview:
dmls.field.player_limit.label: Player limit:
dmls.validation.player_igns: Enter at least one player IGN.
dmls.validation.server_address: Enter a valid host[:port] or *.host[:port] rule. URLs, paths and whitespace are not allowed.
dmls.validation.server_duplicate: That server rule is already allowed.
dmls.chat.rank.current: §7Your rank is set to %s§r§7. Change it with §6/dmls rank <rank>§7.
dmls.chat.rank.required: §7This requires %s§r§7 or higher, but your rank is set to %s§r§7. Change it with §6/dmls rank <rank>§7.
dmls.chat.alerts.status: §7Chat alerts are %s§7 with §6%s§7 words loaded. Use §6/dmls alerts <on|off|reload>§7.
dmls.chat.alerts.reload_failed: §cCould not reload the alert wordlist; keeping §6%s§c previously loaded words.
dmls.help.checklands: Checks which lands the given players are in and their rank in each. Multiple names are checked one after another.
dmls.help.checkmembers: Lists all members of a land grouped by rank. Click a name to run /checklands on them.
dmls.help.checkalts: Runs /alts and then /history on every found account, with a punishment summary. Requires %s§r.
dmls.help.uuid: Looks up one or more Minecraft usernames using Mojang's bulk profile API.
dmls.help.xray: Stages an exact rollback preview, then requires a 30-second token confirmation. Requires %s§r.
dmls.help.prefix: Creates a formatted prefix and sets its player limit and manager. Requires %s§r.
dmls.help.donorpet: Gives a donor permission for their elite mount pet. Requires %s§r.
dmls.help.promowave: Stages a paced, response-confirmed promotion wave for review. Requires %s§r.
dmls.help.rank: Shows or sets the local rank used to display modules; it does not grant or detect server permissions.
dmls.help.alerts: Shows or toggles chat alerts. Words are configured in config/dmls-alerts.txt.
dmls.help.say: Sends a pre-written staff reply in chat.
dmls.help.hover:
%s
§8Click to put the command in your chat bar.
dmls.validation.required_rank: This module is hidden for the locally selected rank; server permissions are authoritative.
dmls.validation.prefix.active: A prefix creation is still running; wait for it to finish.
dmls.validation.prefix.limit: The player limit must be a whole number from 1 to 2147483647.
dmls.validation.prefix.command_length: The create command is %s/%s characters. Ask an admin to create it via console, shorten the prefix ID, ask the player for a smaller prefix by removing text or color, or try a more compact format.
dmls.chat.promo.active: A promotion wave is still running; wait for it to finish.
dmls.chat.promo.done.one: Done! Promoted §6%s§7 player to §6%s§7: §6%s§7. Check the LuckPerms output above for errors.
dmls.chat.promo.done.many: Done! Promoted §6%s§7 players to §6%s§7: §6%s§7. Check the LuckPerms output above for errors.
dmls.chat.xray.active: A rollback for §6%s§7 is still running; wait for it to finish.
dmls.chat.prefix.created.after: §7, player limit §6%s§7 and manager §6%s§7. Check the info above to confirm.
dmls.chat.check_alts.no_alts: No known alts; checking history of §6%s§7 only.
dmls.chat.check_alts.counts_note: §8Only recognized records after a matching /history header are counted.
dmls.chat.check_members.truncated: §8(list truncated by the menu; some members are not shown)
dmls.chat.check_alts.read_failed: Could not read the §6/alts§7 output; checking history of §6%s§7 only.
dmls.chat.check_alts.found_limited: Found §6%s§7 alts; only checking the first §6%s§7.
dmls.chat.xray.cancelled.user: Rollback cancelled. No further commands will be sent.
dmls.chat.xray.cancelled.connection: Rollback cancelled because the connection or server changed.
dmls.chat.server_guard.blocked: Stoneworks command blocked (%s): §6%s§7. Configure allowedServers in config/dmls.properties.
dmls.chat.command.not_sent: Command was not sent because the connection or allowed server changed.
dmls.chat.donor_pet.sent: Permission command sent for §6%s§7 / §6%s§7 (§8%s§7); server confirmation was not observed.
dmls.chat.donor_pet.waiting: Permission command sent for §6%s§7 / §6%s§7; waiting for LuckPerms confirmation.
dmls.chat.donor_pet.active: A donor-pet permission command is already awaiting confirmation.
dmls.chat.prefix.dispatched.before: Dispatched prefix commands for §6%s§7 with text
dmls.chat.prefix.dispatched.after: §7, player limit §6%s§7 and manager §6%s§7. Verify the server output.
dmls.chat.prefix.rejected.before: Stopped prefix creation for §6%s§7 after a rejected command; its requested text was
dmls.chat.prefix.rejected.after: §7, requested limit §6%s§7 and manager §6%s§7. No further prefix commands were sent.
dmls.chat.prefix.timed_out.before: Stopped prefix creation for §6%s§7 because a command response timed out; its requested text was
dmls.chat.prefix.timed_out.after: §7, requested limit §6%s§7 and manager §6%s§7. No further prefix commands were sent.
dmls.chat.prefix.cancelled: Prefix sequence cancelled because the connection or allowed server changed.
dmls.chat.promo.dispatched.one: Dispatched commands for §6%s§7 player toward §6%s§7: §6%s§7. Verify LuckPerms output.
dmls.chat.promo.dispatched.many: Dispatched commands for §6%s§7 players toward §6%s§7: §6%s§7. Verify LuckPerms output.
dmls.chat.promo.confirmed.one: Confirmed promotion commands for §6%s§7 player to §6%s§7: §6%s§7.
dmls.chat.promo.confirmed.many: Confirmed promotion commands for §6%s§7 players to §6%s§7: §6%s§7.
dmls.chat.promo.cancelled: Promotion wave cancelled after §6%s/%s§7 players; next command was for §6%s§7 while changing §6%s§7.
dmls.chat.session.cancelled: Session cancelled because the connection or allowed server changed.
dmls.chat.operation.cancelled: The active response-tracked operation was cancelled.
dmls.chat.uuid.active: A UUID lookup is already running.
dmls.chat.uuid.looking_up.one: Looking up §6%s§7 Minecraft profile with Mojang...
dmls.chat.uuid.looking_up.many: Looking up §6%s§7 Minecraft profiles with Mojang...
dmls.chat.uuid.too_many: Enter at most §6%s§7 usernames per lookup.
dmls.chat.uuid.not_found: No Mojang profile was found for §6%s§7.
dmls.chat.uuid.rate_limited: Mojang is rate limiting UUID lookups. Please try again shortly.
dmls.chat.uuid.error: The Mojang UUID lookup failed. Please try again.
dmls.validation.uuid.too_many: Enter at most %s usernames per lookup.
dmls.module.away.name: Away Responder
dmls.module.away.description: Replies to private messages while you're away.
dmls.field.brb_duration.label: BRB duration:
dmls.validation.brb_duration: Use a duration like 5m, 30m or 1h (up to 24h).
dmls.chat.away.brb.invalid: Use a duration like 5m, 30m or 1h (up to 24h).
dmls.chat.away.off: Welcome back. Away replies are off.
dmls.chat.away.summary.one: %s person messaged you while you were away: %s.
dmls.chat.away.summary.many: %s people messaged you while you were away: %s.
dmls.help.brb: Start BRB replies for a set amount of time.
dmls.help.dnd: Turn DND replies on or off.
dmls.module.activity.name: Activity Wave
dmls.module.activity.description: Check the recent activity of a whole staff wave at once.
dmls.chat.activity.active: An activity check is still running, wait for it to finish.
dmls.chat.activity.too_many: Enter at most %s players per check.
dmls.chat.activity.header: Activity report, last %s days, sorted by hours:
dmls.help.activity: Checks /activity for every listed staff member, preserves partial results, and supports cancel. Requires %s.
dmls.module.demo_wave.name: Demo Wave
dmls.module.demo_wave.description.1: Remove a staff rank from a whole wave at once,
dmls.module.demo_wave.warning: This removes the selected rank from every listed player.
dmls.chat.demo.active: A demotion wave is still running, wait for it to finish.
dmls.chat.demo.confirmed.one: Confirmed demotion commands for %s player from %s: %s.
dmls.chat.demo.confirmed.many: Confirmed demotion commands for %s players from %s: %s.
dmls.chat.demo.cancelled: Demotion wave cancelled after %s/%s players; next command was for %s while changing %s.
dmls.help.demowave: Stages a paced, response-confirmed demotion wave for review. Requires %s.
dmls.module.chat_replay.name: Chat Replay
dmls.module.chat_replay.description: Scroll through the full session chat and filter it by player or text.
dmls.screen.chat_replay.empty: No chat captured yet this session.
dmls.screen.chat_replay.load_failed: Could not load this chat replay.
dmls.help.chatlog: Opens a scrollable log of this session's chat with a player or text filter.
dmls.chat.dry_run.status.on: Dry run is on: DMLS prints commands instead of running them.
dmls.chat.dry_run.status.off: Dry run is off, commands run for real.
dmls.chat.dry_run.enabled: Dry run enabled: DMLS prints every command instead of running it. Resets when the game restarts.
dmls.chat.dry_run.disabled: Dry run disabled, commands run for real again.
dmls.help.dryrun: Toggles dry run mode where DMLS prints every command instead of running it. Requires %s.
dmls.module.greeter.name: New Player Greeter
dmls.module.greeter.description: Spot first-join broadcasts and welcome new players with one click.
dmls.chat.greeter.button.hover: Sends a public welcome message for %s.
dmls.help.greet: Sends the public welcome message for a player.
dmls.module.locations.name: Locations
dmls.module.locations.description: Save named locations like grief sites and teleport back with one click.
dmls.chat.locations.invalid_name: Enter a name with at most %s characters.
dmls.chat.locations.empty: No saved locations yet. Save one with /dmls loc save <name>.
dmls.chat.locations.header: Saved locations (%s), click one to teleport:
dmls.screen.locations.empty: No saved locations yet. Save one with /dmls loc save <name>.
dmls.help.loc: Saves named locations client-side and teleports back to them on click.
dmls.module.co_builder.name: CoreProtect Builder
dmls.module.co_builder.description.1: Compose CoreProtect lookups, rollbacks and restores
dmls.module.co_builder.description.2: from a form instead of memorized syntax.
dmls.module.co_builder.warning: Rollbacks and restores change the world, double-check the preview.
dmls.field.co.user.label: User (u:):
dmls.field.co.time.label: Time (t:):
dmls.field.co.radius.label: Radius (r:):
dmls.field.co.include.label: Include (i:), comma-separated:
dmls.field.co.exclude.label: Exclude (e:), comma-separated:
dmls.validation.co.mode: Pick a mode: lookup, rollback or restore.
dmls.validation.co.user: The user must be a valid player name.
dmls.validation.co.time: The time must look like 30d, 12h or 1h30m.
dmls.validation.co.radius: The radius must be a number or #global.
dmls.validation.co.include: The include list may only contain block or item names, separated by commas.
dmls.validation.co.exclude: The exclude list may only contain block or item names, separated by commas.
dmls.validation.co.time_required: Rollbacks and restores need a time, like t:30d.
dmls.validation.co.target_required: Rollbacks and restores need a user or a radius.
dmls.validation.co.lookup_empty: A lookup needs at least one of user, time, radius or include.
dmls.help.co: Opens a form that composes CoreProtect commands with validation. Requires %s.
dmls.module.containers.name: Container Scan
dmls.module.containers.description.1: Scan container activity around you with CoreProtect
dmls.module.containers.description.2: and summarize who took and added what.
dmls.field.containers.ign.label: Player IGN, or * for everyone:
dmls.validation.containers: Fill in the time and radius.
dmls.validation.scan.busy: Another response-tracked operation is already running.
dmls.validation.scan.start_failed: The scan could not be started.
dmls.chat.scan.busy: %s is already using the response tracker; cancel or finish it first.
dmls.chat.scan.start_failed: The scan could not acquire a safe operation session.
dmls.chat.scan.simulated: Simulated %s. No server results or follow-up pages were fabricated.
dmls.chat.scan.no_partial_results: No confirmed or partial results were collected.
dmls.chat.scan.stop.unconfirmed: Stopped after page %s produced data without a matching page marker; those entries are shown as unconfirmed partial results.
dmls.chat.scan.stop.timeout: Timed out waiting for a matching response to requested page %s; partial results are shown.
dmls.chat.scan.stop.rejected: CoreProtect rejected the lookup; partial results are shown.
dmls.chat.scan.stop.malformed: CoreProtect returned malformed or overflowing data; the scan stopped safely with partial results.
dmls.chat.scan.stop.time_limit: Stopped at the %s-minute safety limit; narrow the query to scan the remainder.
dmls.chat.scan.stop.aggregate_limit: Stopped at the %s-distinct-result safety limit; narrow the query to scan the remainder.
dmls.chat.scan.stop.dispatch: Could not safely request page %s; no further commands were sent and partial results are shown.
dmls.chat.scan.stop.cancelled: Cancelled; parsed data from the current unconfirmed page is included below.
dmls.chat.scan.stop.connection: The connection changed; no further commands were sent and partial results are shown.
dmls.chat.scan.stop.internal: The scan stopped after an internal error; partial results are shown.
dmls.chat.containers.start: Scanning container activity (t:%s r:%s), collecting all pages. Run %s to stop.
dmls.chat.containers.cancelled: Container scan cancelled, showing what was collected so far.
dmls.chat.containers.active: A container scan is still running, wait for it to finish.
dmls.chat.containers.pages.capped: Confirmed %s of %s pages; the 1,000-page safety cap was reached.
dmls.help.containers: Scans container activity and summarizes who took and added what. Requires %s.
dmls.module.griefs.name: Grief Scan
dmls.module.griefs.description.1: Scan block activity around you with CoreProtect
dmls.module.griefs.description.2: and summarize who broke and placed what.
dmls.chat.griefs.start: Scanning block activity (t:%s r:%s), collecting all pages. Run %s to stop.
dmls.chat.griefs.cancelled: Grief scan cancelled, showing what was collected so far.
dmls.chat.griefs.active: A grief scan is still running, wait for it to finish.
dmls.chat.griefs.pages.capped: Confirmed %s of %s pages; the 1,000-page safety cap was reached.
dmls.help.griefs: Scans block activity and summarizes who broke and placed what. Requires %s.
dmls.module.punish.name: Punishment Helper
dmls.module.punish.description.1: Search the Stoneworks rulebook and its ban ladders,
dmls.module.punish.description.2: then compose a ban log to copy.
dmls.help.punish: Opens the rulebook browser and ban-log composer.
dmls.screen.ban_log.title: Ban Log
dmls.chat.punish.ban_incomplete: Fill in the ban duration and reason first.
dmls.chat.punish.banned: Ran /ban on %s for %s. Check the server response above.
dmls.chat.confirmation.none: No active confirmation is waiting. Stage the request again.
dmls.chat.confirmation.invalid: That confirmation token is invalid; nothing was sent.
dmls.chat.confirmation.expired: That confirmation expired; nothing was sent.
dmls.chat.confirmation.cancelled: Pending confirmation cancelled; nothing was sent.
dmls.chat.confirmation.instructions: Review every command above, then run §6%s§7 within 30 seconds, or §6%s§7.
dmls.chat.operation.busy: Another response-tracked operation is active: §6%s§7. Finish or cancel it first.
dmls.chat.operation.not_started: The operation could not start safely (§6%s§7); nothing was sent.
dmls.chat.operation.start_failed: The operation could not start safely; nothing was sent.
dmls.validation.operation.blocked: This action is blocked by rank, connection, or server safety. See chat for details.
dmls.validation.operation.busy: Another response-tracked operation is active. Finish or cancel it first.
dmls.validation.operation.rank_blocked: The locally selected rank cannot run this action.
dmls.validation.operation.start_failed: The operation could not start safely; nothing was sent.
dmls.screen.confirmation.failed: Confirmation failed; nothing was sent. Check chat, then edit or try again.
dmls.screen.confirmation.expired: Confirmation expired or became stale; nothing was sent.
dmls.chat.xray.preview: Staged xray rollback for §6%s§7. Exact commands follow:
dmls.chat.promo.preview: Staged %s-player promotion to %s: %s. Exact commands follow:
dmls.chat.promo.too_many: Enter at most %s unique valid players per promotion wave.
dmls.chat.promo.simulated.one: Simulated promotion commands for %s player to %s: %s. Nothing was sent.
dmls.chat.promo.simulated.many: Simulated promotion commands for %s players to %s: %s. Nothing was sent.
dmls.chat.promo.rejected: Stopped after %s/%s players; the server rejected the command for %s while changing %s.
dmls.chat.promo.timed_out: Stopped after %s/%s players; confirmation timed out for %s while changing %s.
dmls.chat.promo.blocked: Stopped after %s/%s players; dispatch was blocked for %s while changing %s.
dmls.chat.promo.failed: Stopped after %s/%s players because parsing failed at %s while changing %s.
dmls.chat.promo.cancelled_connection: Connection changed after %s/%s players; no command was sent for %s while changing %s.
dmls.chat.promo.partial: Stopped with %s/%s players complete; next command was for %s while changing %s.
dmls.screen.promo.review_summary: %s players will be promoted to %s using these exact commands:
dmls.chat.demo.preview: Staged %s-player demotion from %s: %s. Exact commands follow:
dmls.chat.demo.too_many: Enter at most %s unique valid players per demotion wave.
dmls.chat.demo.simulated.one: Simulated demotion commands for %s player from %s: %s. Nothing was sent.
dmls.chat.demo.simulated.many: Simulated demotion commands for %s players from %s: %s. Nothing was sent.
dmls.chat.demo.rejected: Stopped after %s/%s players; the server rejected the command for %s while changing %s.
dmls.chat.demo.timed_out: Stopped after %s/%s players; confirmation timed out for %s while changing %s.
dmls.chat.demo.blocked: Stopped after %s/%s players; dispatch was blocked for %s while changing %s.
dmls.chat.demo.failed: Stopped after %s/%s players because parsing failed at %s while changing %s.

dmls.chat.activity.cancelled: Activity wave cancelled; partial results are shown above.
dmls.chat.donor_pet.rejected: The server rejected the pet permission for %s / %s (%s).
dmls.chat.donor_pet.simulated: Simulated the pet permission for %s / %s (%s); nothing was sent.
dmls.chat.donor_pet.cancelled: Pet permission for %s / %s was cancelled; its result is unverified.
dmls.validation.co.command_too_long: The composed CoreProtect command is too long; narrow the lists or target.
dmls.chat.co.unverified: No recognized completion arrived for the %s operation; treat it as sent but unverified.
dmls.chat.co.cancelled: The %s operation was cancelled (%s); no further command was sent.
dmls.screen.co.review_warning: This %s mutates CoreProtect data. Review the exact command:
dmls.chat.locations.io_error: Could not save locations; the previous in-memory and disk data remain active.
dmls.chat.locations.unbound: %s is a legacy unbound location. Re-save it on the intended server first.
dmls.chat.locations.wrong_server: %s belongs to %s, not the current server %s.
dmls.chat.locations.wrong_world: %s belongs to dimension %s, not the current dimension %s.
dmls.chat.menu_query.simulated: Simulated %s; no menu data was fabricated.
dmls.chat.menu_query.malformed: The menu for %s was missing or malformed; nothing was inferred.
dmls.chat.menu_query.timeout: Timed out waiting for the menu opened by %s.
dmls.chat.uuid.malformed_response: Mojang returned a malformed profile response. No result was trusted.
dmls.chat.uuid.timeout: The Mojang UUID lookup timed out. Please try again.
dmls.chat.uuid.network_error: The Mojang UUID lookup failed because of a network error.
dmls.validation.ban.ign: Enter a valid Minecraft username for the ban.
dmls.validation.ban.duration: Enter a duration such as 30m, 7d, 2w, 1mo, 1y, or perm.
dmls.validation.ban.reason: Enter a 1-200 character reason without line breaks or control characters.
dmls.screen.ban_log.confirm_expired: Ban confirmation expired or became stale; nothing was sent.
dmls.screen.punish.load_failed: The bundled rulebook could not be loaded safely.
dmls.help.cancel: Cancels the active response-tracked operation without sending further commands.
dmls.validation.locations.teleport_block: Teleport was blocked; check chat for the server or dimension mismatch.
dmls.validation.locations.action_blocked: The location change failed; prior saved data remains active.
dmls.chat.check_members.invalid_land: Land names must be 1–64 characters and contain no control characters.
dmls.help.greeter: Shows or changes the persisted first-join greeting prompt toggle.
